raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Revenues are up, which is a reflection of our growing economy.",
    "The tough choices made last year have paid off.",
    "The 2025-26 Budget will likely have fewer to no significant additional cuts.",
    "Investments in career education are aimed at increasing access to high-demand careers like computer science and cybersecurity.",
    "California is making substantial investments in career education to make it easier for residents to receive college credit for real-world experience."
```
